Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WPLIBERACAOPEDIDOS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &AutNiv) loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = 30 Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &actionsData = new() &actionsDataItem = new() &actionsDataItem.Title = 'WWP_ExportCaption' &actionsDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &actionsDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &actionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &actionsData.Add(&actionsDataItem) &actionsDataItem = new() &actionsDataItem.Title = 'WWP_ExportReportCaption' &actionsDataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &actionsDataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &actionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &actionsData.Add(&actionsDataItem) &PedLibSts = nullvalue(&PedLibSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &PedLibSolDta1.IsEmpty() &PedLibSolDta1 = serverDate() - 16 EndiF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &actionOq.Clear() &actionOq.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (PedLibCliCod > 0) &actionOq.AddItem(1, 'Histórico') Endif If &actionOq.Count = 1 &actionOq.Class = !'Invisible' Else &actionOq.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &AutorizarIndividua = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PesRaz = RetornaNomePessoa.Udp(EmpCod, PedLibCliCod) &Cliente = trim(str(PedLibCliCod)) + ' - ' + trim(&PesRaz) &Cliente.Tooltiptext = &Cliente &Cliente = gxGetMLi(&Cliente, 1, 30) Do Case Case PedLibTip = TipoLiberacao.LiberacaoProduto PedCod.Link = wppedidovendaitem.Link('PEDIDOVENDA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 0) &Tipo = 'PRODUTO' &OqueAutorizar = 'PROD: '+trim(str(PedLibProCod)) If not PedLibSolPedDesc.IsEmpty() &OqueAutorizar += '; DESC.:' + trim(toformattedString(PedLibSolPedDesc)) EndiF If not PedLibSolPedQtd.IsEmpty() &OqueAutorizar += '; QTD.:' + trim(toformattedString(PedLibSolPedQtd)) EndiF If not PedLIbSolPedVlr.IsEmpty() &OqueAutorizar += '; UNIT.:' + trim(toformattedString(PedLIbSolPedVlr)) EndIF Case PedLibTip = TipoLiberacao.LIberacaoCapaPedido &Tipo = 'PEDIDO' &OqueAutorizar = '' Otherwise &Tipo = 'PEDIDO' &OqueAutorizar = '' EndCase &IsSelect.Enabled = false Do Case Case PedLIbRea = 1 //REAVALIACAO PedLibItm.BackColor = RGB(0,100,200) Case PedLibSts = StatusLiberacao.Autorizado PedLibItm.BackColor = RGB(0,150,100) &AutorizarIndividua = !'' Case PedLibSts = StatusLiberacao.NaoAutorizado &AutorizarIndividua = !'' PedLibItm.BackColor = RGB(200,50,0) Otherwise //Aguardando &IsSelect.Enabled = true PedLibItm.BackColor = RGB(255,255,255) EndCase EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &actionOq.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &actionOq = 1 Do 'Do HistoricoCliente' EndCase &actionOq = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBtnAutorizar' do 'Selecionados' if &sdtPedidos.Count >= 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnBtnAutorizar.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Nenhum pedido de autorização foi selecionado!') EndIF EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnBtnAutorizar.Close If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnBtnAutorizar.Result = !'Yes' For &sdtPedidosItem in &sdtPedidos /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnBtnAutorizar.Result = !'Yes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ AutorizaBloqueiaLiberacao.Call('AUT', &sdtPedidosItem.EmpCod, &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod, &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod, &sdtPedidosItem.PeditmCod, &sdtPedidosItem.PedQtd, &sdtPedidosItem.PedItmDsc, &sdtPedidosItem.PedVlrUnt, &sdtPedidosItem.Mensagem, &Context.PesCod, &Context.UserName) EndFor Refresh EndIF EndEvent Event 'DoBtnDesautorizar' do 'Selecionados' if &sdtPedidos.Count >= 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnBtnDesautorizar.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Nenhum pedido de autorização foi selecionado!') EndIF EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnBtnDesautorizar.Close For &sdtPedidosItem in &sdtPedidos /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnBtnDesautorizar.Result = !'Yes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ AutorizaBloqueiaLiberacao.Call('BLO', &sdtPedidosItem.EmpCod, &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod, &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod, &sdtPedidosItem.PeditmCod, &sdtPedidosItem.PedQtd, &sdtPedidosItem.PedItmDsc, &sdtPedidosItem.PedVlrUnt, &sdtPedidosItem.Mensagem, &Context.PesCod, &Context.UserName) EndFor Refresh EndEvent Event ddo_actions.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_actions.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_actions.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PedLibSolDta1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &PedLibSolDta1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PedLibSolDta2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &PedLibSolDta2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PedLibSolDta3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &PedLibSolDta3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &PedLibSolDta2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &PedLibSolDta3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do HistoricoCliente' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDLIBCLICOD" &PedLibCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDLIBSOLFUN" &PedLibSolFun.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDLIBSTS" &PedLibSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &PedLibSolDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDLIBCLICOD", "", not &PedLibCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedLibCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDLIBSOLFUN", "", not &PedLibSolFun.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedLibSolFun.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDLIBSTS", "", not &PedLibSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedLibSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedLibSolDta1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedLibSolDta2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDLIBSOLDTA' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedLibSolDta3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwpLiberacaoPedidos.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwpLiberacaoPedidos.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &AutorizarIndividua.Click Do Case Case PedLibTip = TipoLiberacao.LiberacaoProduto wpAutorizarSolicitacao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedLibItm) Refresh EndCase EndEvent Sub 'Selecionados' &sdtPedidos.Clear() For Each Line in grid If &IsSelect = true &sdtPedidosItem = new() &sdtPedidosItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.ProCod = PedLibProCod &sdtPedidosItem.ProGraCod = PedLibProGraCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedQtd = PedLibSolPedQtd &sdtPedidosItem.PedVlrUnt = PedLIbSolPedVlr &sdtPedidosItem.PedItmDsc = PedLibSolPedDesc &sdtPedidosItem.PeditmCod = PedLibItm &sdtPedidosItem.Mensagem = PedLibAutObs &sdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
